content.en:
"Alliance Leader, this is the Devouring Clan's Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor!"

An elite domain ancestor introduced.

The Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor was very frightened at the moment, for fear that he would be killed.

Ye Tian stared at the Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor and asked, "Listen to other domain ancestors, you yourself are the Dao Mountain Realm, that is, the Devouring Clan Domain Ancestor of this realm?"

"Yes!" Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor hurriedly said, "A long time ago, our Devouring Clan occupied this place, but all the worlds were swallowed up, and we couldn't make any progress, so we left this realm and entered the Dark Forbidden Realm, constantly looking for new realms or new opportunities. "

"Wandering Holy Ancestor, are you still alive?"

Ye Tian asked suddenly.

"It's still alive, and it's already broken through to the Elite Saint Ancestor level!"

Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor hurriedly said.

At this time, the Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor was also very helpless.

At the beginning, all the creatures in this realm were destroyed, and now even if a new cultivation civilization is born, it can't be too powerful!

But he never expected that he would be discovered as soon as he entered this realm, and there were also a large number of domain ancestors.

Along the way, he had already seen a lot of domain ancestors, including the top domain ancestor level.

If he had known that this realm was so powerful, he would not have come back alone.

This realm is so powerful, it is obvious that the Devouring Clan who stayed in this realm in the first place has been wiped out at all.

Of course, he wasn't worried about the lives of those Devourers, he was worried about himself now.

"You told the other Domain Ancestors before that many of the Devouring Clan's Domain Ancestors are here, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, we want to go home, so the devouring clan that left at the beginning has all returned, and the strongest of them have reached the top domain ancestor level. But we just want to go home, we don't have any other thoughts!"

The Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor hurriedly explained.

"Really?"

Ye Tian didn't believe the words of the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor, if he really just wanted to go home, why did the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor come back to investigate?

This is obviously to let the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor investigate the situation in this realm, this is a bit wrong!

The Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor was obviously worried that something would happen to this realm, so he took the lead in coming back to investigate the situation, so as to inform the Devouring Clan Ancestors behind.

And this just shows that they have a bigger plan, which is to devour this realm again, and do they have other ideas?

Ye Tian also knew very well that the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor would reveal a little bit of information at most, and it would be impossible to tell all the secrets.

The point is that the soul of the domain ancestor level is very strong, and if you want to draw memory information from the soul of the domain ancestor, it is almost impossible.

If you want Yu Zu to tell the true secret, you only need to cast an illusion or soul secret technique to manipulate the other party's soul and tell the secret.

But it is limited to the secrets that can be told, and some secrets cannot be told, and no matter how much you use illusions, it is useless.

Ye Tian knew the soul secret technique, but he was not good at that kind of control or illusion type of holy technique, and the suppression of the divine skill could only defend the soul, or launch an attack, and could not make the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor tell the true secret.

"Who is good at illusion or manipulation of soul mysteries?"

Ye Tian asked the other domain ancestors.

At this time, the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor spoke: "Dark Soul Domain Ancestor, Ghost Domain Ancestor, these two Domain Ancestors are top Domain Ancestors, they are better at illusion and soul manipulation domain techniques!"

"Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor, you go and invite them to come and manipulate this Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor and let him tell the secret plan of the Devouring Clan, I always feel that the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor is hiding important information and must be interrogated!"

Ye Tian asked.

"Okay, I'll go and invite them here, with your prestige as the alliance leader, they will definitely give face!"

Ten Thousand Realms Ancestral Dao.

Soon after, the Dark Soul Domain Ancestor and the Ghost Domain Ancestor came.

"I've seen the Alliance Leader!"

The Dark Soul Domain Ancestor and the Ghost Domain Ancestor said respectfully.

"Dark Soul Domain Ancestor, Ghost Domain Ancestor, are you sure that the Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor will tell the true secret?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Be sure!" Dark Soul Domain Ancestor said confidently: "This Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor is just an ordinary Domain Ancestor, and his soul is not strong, there is a big gap in strength between us, it is not difficult to use illusion to make him tell the truth, of course, if it involves secrets such as oaths, then there is no way to let him tell it!"

The Ghost Domain Ancestor also nodded, indicating that he was fine.

"Then ask the two domain ancestors to make a move!"

Ye Tiandao.

Soon, the Dark Soul Domain Ancestor and the Ghost Domain Ancestor made a move, and joined forces to perform illusion and soul domain spells on the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor.

In an instant, the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor was controlled.

"Ask them, what is the real reason for the return of the Devourers to this realm?"

Ye Tian reminded the Dark Soul Domain Ancestor and the Ghost Domain Ancestor.

Subsequently, the Dark Soul Domain Ancestor and the Ghost Domain Ancestor began to question the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor according to Ye Tian's instructions.

Under the manipulation, the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor replied, "Our Devouring Clan came to this realm with several Holy Sons of the Dark Destruction Domain, and it was we who told the Holy Sons that there was a realm here, so that the Holy Sons were willing to cultivate our Devouring Clan. The Sons promised that the world within the realm would be devoured by us, and that they would destroy only the realm. In addition, the Holy Sons are willing to give us a large number of resources suitable for the Devouring Clan's cultivation, and even give us powerful secret techniques suitable for the Devouring Clan, so as to strengthen our strength!"

The other domain ancestors didn't know what the Dark Destruction Domain was, but Ye Tian knew!

He had only fought against countless geniuses in the Dark Destruction Domain in the short term, and had also killed several Saints of the Dark Destruction Domain, so he naturally knew something about the Dark Destruction Domain.

It was precisely because of this understanding that he knew the power of the Dark Destruction Domain.

A few strong men sent there will be enough to destroy this realm.

Now that the coordinates of this realm are exposed, this is a problem.

Soon, the Dark Soul Domain Ancestor and the Ghost Domain Ancestor interrogated the basic situation.

At this time, Ye Tian ordered: "Kill him!"

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor shot directly and slapped the Blood Rainbow Domain Ancestor to death.

Seeing Ye Tian's heavy face, many domain ancestors asked one after another, "Alliance Master, are you worried about those Holy Sons of the Dark Destruction Domain, is the Dark Destruction Domain very powerful?"

Ye Tian nodded and said, "You should all know the Dark Sacred Domain, the Dark Destruction Domain and the Dark Sacred Domain are almost at the same level, the Dark Destruction Domain is the territory of the Destruction Saint Clan and the Three Thousand Evil Clans, there is the source of all destruction, and it is the real Dark Land. For example, the Devouring Clan and the Forbidden Zerg Clan, both of which belong to the Three Thousand Evil Clans. And to be able to become a holy son, even if it is a holy son of the three thousand evil clans, that status is not the same. The Dark Destruction Domain likes to destroy the realm, and although we belong to a realm under the jurisdiction of the Dark Sanctuary here, if the army of the Dark Destruction Domain attacks, the Dark Sanctuary will not necessarily come to help. "

When many domain ancestors heard this, they immediately became terrified.

The Dark Destruction Domain is so powerful, aren't they equal to ants?

How can this be resisted?

"It's not hopeless!" Ye Tian said again: "It's just the Holy Son who has arrived, there may not be a Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Dark Forbidden Domain is very troublesome, as long as we kill all the Devouring Clans and the Dark Destruction Domain Ancestors who came, and don't leave a single living mouth, maybe the location here won't be exposed!"
